scripts.dev: pnpm generate && concurrently "pnpm run server:start" "BROWSER=none pnpm run client:start" --kill-others
scripts.start: pnpm generate && concurrently "pnpm run server:start" "BROWSER=none pnpm run client:start" --kill-others
scripts.compile: concurrently "pnpm run server:start" "BROWSER=none pnpm run client:start" "pnpm run generate:watch" --kill-others
scripts.db:add: cd db && pnpm install && NODE_OPTIONS="--loader ts-node/esm --require dotenv/config" node src/index.ts add
scripts.db:clean: cd db && pnpm install && NODE_OPTIONS="--loader ts-node/esm --require dotenv/config" node src/index.ts clean
scripts.db:update: cd db && pnpm install && NODE_OPTIONS="--loader ts-node/esm --require dotenv/config" node src/index.ts apply
scripts.db:create: cd db && pnpm install && NODE_OPTIONS="--loader ts-node/esm --require dotenv/config" node src/index.ts create
scripts.db:drop: cd db && pnpm install && NODE_OPTIONS="--loader ts-node/esm --require dotenv/config" node src/index.ts drop
scripts.check:prepush: cd server && pnpm run check:prepush && cd ../client && pnpm run check:prepush
scripts.up: docker compose up --detach postgres clickhouse scylla redis kafka
